vulnerability.reason: Generated 'lack linguistic expertise ... uncritical reliance' covers reference 'over-rely without verifying correctness for complex linguistic structures'.
vulnerability.reference: Users over-rely on SSM completions without verifying correctness for complex linguistic structures.
vulnerability.generated: End-users lack the linguistic expertise to detect SSM failures on non-star-free patterns, leading to uncritical reliance.

impact.reason: Generated mentions grammatical errors and undermining clarity/trust, but misses erosion of professional credibility.
impact.reference: Dissemination of grammatically flawed or semantically distorted text, eroding professional credibility.
impact.generated: Incorrect text completions propagate into user documents, causing subtle grammatical errors that undermine communication clarity and trust.

dose_response.reason: Causal arc from restricted expressive power, through user over-reliance, to propagation of flawed text undermining trust is present.
dose_response.reference: The restricted expressive power of SSMs for non-star-free languages yields inaccurate linguistic constructions, so when end-users over-rely on completions, flawed text is disseminated, eroding professional credibility.
dose_response.generated: SSM design choices restricting expressive power for non-star-free patterns, through end-user reliance on SSM-generated text for writing assistance, trigger lack of expertise to detect non-star-free failures, leading to uncritical reliance propagating incorrect completions with subtle errors undermining clarity and trust.
